features.name: Blog/legal translation integrity
features.gap: No visual/layout assertions for every public page; this only checks translation warnings.

features.name: Homepage, programs, contact, and blog form flows
features.gap: No dedicated automated submission, validation, or responsive-layout suite exists yet.

features.name: Admin dashboard shell and KPI rails
features.gap: Local stub coverage is strong, but this still does not exercise the live Supabase backend.

features.name: Admin management workflows (users, enrollments, announcements, reports, settings, courses)
features.gap: No live-backend assertions for these admin mutations yet.

features.name: Trainer workflows (grading, schedules, messages, course builder)
features.gap: Coverage is stub-based; it does not prove live RLS behavior or persisted writes.

features.name: Student dashboard access and learning flows
features.gap: Student flow is represented, but real end-to-end state transitions against production-like data are still limited.

features.name: Live enrollment, payment, and progress persistence
features.gap: Covers isolated live inserts and the admin payment workflow that creates enrollment and course_progress rows.

features.name: Student submission writes and progress-write denial
features.gap: Student-owned assignment submissions persist successfully; course_progress write attempts fail explicitly by RLS.

features.name: Trainer course create/update/delete persistence
features.gap: Validates live course CRUD for trainer-owned records with isolated slugs and delete cleanup.

features.name: Live test-data isolation and cleanup
features.gap: Live write tests now register created rows for cleanup so repeat runs do not collide in Supabase.

features.name: Marketer portal access control
features.gap: Portal access is covered, but live claim creation is not yet validated end to end.

features.name: Claim submission and review flows
features.gap: Live inserts now prove marketer claim persistence plus admin-only status escalation.

features.name: Live auth/session bootstrap and role routing
features.gap: Live login is covered, but password-reset, session expiry, and MFA-style edge cases are not covered.

features.name: Protected routes and unauthorized redirects
features.gap: Routes are covered, but the full matrix of direct URL access and stale-session behavior is still limited.

features.name: Expired, forged, and forced logout session handling
features.gap: Local guard coverage now verifies expired sessions, forged tokens, and forced logout recovery against the real route logic.

features.name: Post-suite live cleanup audit
features.gap: Confirms the live QA run leaves no orphan QA-tagged rows behind in Supabase.

features.name: RLS enforcement and role escalation prevention
features.gap: Now covers insert/update/delete restrictions across core LMS and marketer tables, plus explicit failure assertions.

recommendedTags.meaning: Release-blocking flows that must pass in smoke and live security checks.
Sign-in, sign-out, session bootstrap, and route-guard behavior.
Role routing, access control, and role-escalation resistance.
Student, trainer, and admin dashboard flows for the LMS.
Marketer portal flows, including claims and role-gated access.
Tests that exercise the live Supabase backend, RLS, and auth state.
Public marketing, blog, legal, and brochure-style pages.

tiers.name: Full regression
tiers.scope: All local Playwright tests except live Supabase specs

tiers.name: Live Supabase
tiers.scope: Live Supabase auth and RBAC suite only
